message:
Add progress metrics for long-running tools and SSE stream benchmarks

Bash tool progress tracking (src/tools.rs):
- Add timeout_ms, line_count, start_time fields to BashOutputState
- Count newlines per chunk via memchr::memchr_iter in process_bash_chunk()
- Emit progress metrics in details.progress JSON on every ToolUpdate:
  elapsedMs (wall-clock), lineCount (accumulated), byteCount (total),
  timeoutMs (if timeout configured)
- Always include details map in ToolUpdate (was previously omitted when
  empty), enabling TUI to display progress without special-casing

SSE stream benchmarks (benches/tools.rs):
- Add bench_sse_stream() group measuring SseStream throughput with
  chunk sizes 64, 1024, 4096 bytes over 1000-event payloads
- Add chunk_bytes() helper for splitting byte slices
- Uses futures::executor::block_on for async stream consumption

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
